useCases.title: Public communication
useCases.body: Theatre programmes flow automatically to online event platforms, public displays and media coverage. Maintain once, visible everywhere.

useCases.title: Archiving
useCases.body: Performances, casts and works are transferred with standardised identifiers into research and cultural archives. Theatre history stays digitally and permanently findable.

useCases.title: Job boards & casting platforms
useCases.body: Production data reaches casting platforms and artist databases automatically. Open positions and engagements become connected and visible.
